▼ Expand
4thwall is not a dev shop — it's a vertical intelligence company. Every scan reveals the same 3–5 problems repeating across an entire vertical. That's one product, built once, sold to all of them. You walk in knowing the roofer's pain before they say a word — because you already talked to 12 of their neighbors.

The Strategic Moat
You walk into Grizzly Junk Pros with Haul & Fill AI already running — not a pitch deck. Justin isn't buying custom work. He's buying access to a product that already exists, priced at $2,997, already proven on 4 of his competitors. No national AI vendor can walk in with that. They haven't talked to his neighbors. You have.
First Close Sequencing
Start with Pool Pro AI (7 targets, highest ROI story: one recovered heater job = 27 months of subscription). Then Trade Capture AI (7 targets, broadest vertical — chimney, handyman, locksmith, landscaper). Both are same-day or this-week closes. Get two live before pitching MSP Growth Engine ($9,997 setup).
